news.headline: Energy Capital Partners and co-investors' acquisition approved by the High Court of Justice of England and Wales.
news.summary: The High Court of Justice of England and Wales has granted approval for the acquisition by Energy Capital Partners and co-investors. This deal involves a significant investment in the energy sector and marks a key milestone for the companies involved. The acquisition was finalized after meeting all legal requirements and receiving the court's authorization. This move signifies a substantial transaction in the industry, with the total investment amounting to [insert specific number] million dollars. The court's decision reflects confidence in the deal and its potential benefits for the energy market.

news.headline: Apollo Art Auctions' Dec. 15 auction showcases rare Egyptian treasures from Prince Collection, including granite head, vessel, and sandstone relief.
news.summary: A collection of Egyptian artifacts recently unveiled in London features a unique granite head of a pharaoh, a large vessel adorned with a painted image of the Nile scene, and a sandstone relief from the Amarna Period depicting a pharaoh in worship of the god Aton. Additionally, the exhibit showcases exquisite Greek and Roman jewelry. Scheduled for public viewing starting December 15, 2024, at Apollo Art, these treasures offer a glimpse into ancient civilizations and their artistic prowess.

news.headline: William C. Huff introduces White Glove Transportation services in Naples, Fla., offering top-notch care for valuable goods.
news.summary: In Naples, Florida, on December 10, 2024, William C. Huff has launched a new premium White Glove Transportation service. This service is specifically designed to cater to the needs of moving high-value and delicate items with the highest level of care and expertise. This catered service is aimed at businesses and offers specialized transportation services.

news.headline: Multifamily investment outlook for 2025 positive - rents & construction costs to rise, banks face losses, inflation to increase.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 10, 2024, investment firm Origin Investments expects a rise in multifamily rents and construction costs for the upcoming year 2025. They anticipate that changes in banks' strategies, particularly the "extend and pretend" approach, will lead to substantial losses across the industry. In addition, inflation is forecasted to go up, impacting consumer prices.

news.headline: KMS Lighthouse recognized in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of knowledge management solutions 2024.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 10, 2024, KMS Lighthouse Limited, a prominent player in knowledge management on a global scale, was featured in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of knowledge management solutions 2024. This recognition underscores their dedication to providing cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Healthier Capital invests in Hyro with $50 million, advancing AI solutions in healthcare. Former One Medical CEO leads.
news.summary: Hyro, a prominent provider of voice and chat AI solutions in the healthcare sector, has recently secured additional growth capital. The latest funding round has brought the total amount raised by Hyro to $50 million. This capital infusion will be utilized to enhance their conversational and generative AI technologies, with a focus on expanding their presence in key channels and segments within the healthcare industry. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Enzymedica launches SubCulture™ probiotics line to target bloat, mood, women's health. Includes foundational strains.
news.summary: A new line of probiotics containing clinically researched foundational strains for digestion, regularity, and immune health has been introduced by Enzymedica® in Venice, Florida. Launched on December 10, 2024, the products are designed to support overall well-being.

news.headline: 2024 Understanding China Conference in Guangzhou, ends successfully after three days, gathers political leaders, scholars, business executives, and international organizations for insightful discussions on Chinese modernization.
news.summary: The recent Understanding China International Conference held in Guangzhou, China, concluded on December 10, 2024, after a three-day event filled with valuable discussions. The conference brought together various key figures, including political leaders, scholars, business executives, and representatives from international organizations. The event served as a platform for exchanging ideas and insights on a wide range of topics related to China.

news.headline: Giving Compass appoints Milan Ball as Director of Development and Partnerships, and Kavitha Thimmaiah as Director of Donor Education to drive philanthropic partnerships.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Giving Compass, a prominent player in donor education, revealed the appointment of two key executives to its leadership team. Milan Ball has been welcomed as the Director of Development and Partnerships, and Kavitha Thimmaiah will assume the position of Director of Donor.

news.headline: Novatech partners with Equalis Group to offer nationwide contract benefits to public agencies.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated December 10, 2024, Novatech, a prominent nationwide provider of Managed Office Solutions based in Nashville, Tennessee, shared the news that public agencies throughout the United States now have the opportunity to benefit from its extensive technology offerings. This access is facilitated through a simplified procurement process, making it easier for public entities to leverage Novatech's comprehensive portfolio of solutions.

news.headline: Dorot Gardens® introduces 'Wilt Insurance' program, trade-in wilted herbs for coupon; launched Dec 10 2024.
news.summary: Recently in Bayonne, New Jersey, Dorot Gardens® announced the unveiling of its 'Wilt Insurance' program on Dec. 10, 2024. The program offers a distinctive opportunity for individuals to trade in their wilted herbs in return for a coupon. Dorot Gardens® is renowned for its fresh-frozen, pre-portioned herbs and garlic products. This initiative aims to provide customers with an incentive to exchange their wilted herbs for a coupon towards the purchase of new products.

news.headline: 83% consumers prioritize credit card perks. Survey by CardRates, revealed 73% choose based on perks.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida, on December 10, 2024, a recent survey carried out by CardRates.com indicated a clear trend in consumer behavior regarding credit cards. The study highlighted that 73% of participants are placing a significant emphasis on credit card perks when considering opening a new credit card account. This survey reflects a growing interest among consumers in leveraging the benefits offered by credit cards, as reported by the leading financial resource aiming to enhance consumer knowledge about credit card usage and advantages.

news.headline: Santa's North Pole home undergoes modern makeover by Revive Real Estate's design team in Irvine; 200+ years old.
news.summary: In a festive celebration of the holiday season, Santa and Mrs. Claus have decided to give their legendary North Pole cabin a magical makeover after over two centuries of Christmas traditions. The announcement, made today in Irvine, California, marks a significant milestone in their timeless story.

news.headline: CEO Coaching Intl. celebrates BCC Engineering's $230M sale to Parsons Corp., led by CEO Jose Muñoz. Global growth success!
news.summary: In Miami on December 10, 2024, CEO Coaching International, a prominent executive coaching firm for growth-oriented CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, celebrates the successful sale of its client BCC Engineering, LLC (BCC) to Parsons. The firm extends its congratulations to BCC and President/CEO Jose Muñoz on this achievement.

news.headline: Italy's loyalty programs market set to grow by 10.5% to $4.21 billion in 2024, with future growth dynamics to 2028 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Italy Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in Italy is projected to experience a 10.5% annual growth, with an expected value of US$4.21 billion by 2024. The country's loyalty market has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) in value terms.

news.headline: Ultra-Low Temperature Freezers Market to grow by 4.84%, reaching $820 million by 2032 globally. Demand driven by healthcare, pharmaceuticals, and biotechnology markets, with ULT freezers operating between -40°C and -86°C for long-term storage of biological materials. Key players include Thermo Fisher Scientific, Eppendorf AG, and Panasonic Healthcare. North America dominates market share, with Asia-Pacific showing fastest growth. Growing demand due to advancements in medical research, vaccine development, and environmental concerns.
news.summary: The Ultra-Low Temperature Freezers Market was valued at USD 0.53 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 0.82 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 4.84% during 2024-2032. The market is driven by increased demand from healthcare, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology sectors, particularly due to the need for long-term storage of sensitive biological materials. COVID-19 also boosted demand, especially for mRNA vaccines requiring ultra-low temperatures. North America leads the market, with Asia-Pacific showing fast growth due to healthcare investments. Technological advancements such as energy-efficient compressors are contributing to market growth. Prominent players include Thermo Fisher Scientific and Eppendorf AG. The market is likely to continue expanding as medical research and vaccine development advance, with a focus on providing cold storage solutions across industries.

news.headline: ProImpact launches mentoring program to help first-gen students in college admissions; targets high schools.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California on December 10, 2024, a social impact company called ProImpact has announced the launch of a new college mentoring program. This program aims to empower high schools by providing them with tools to improve assistance for college-bound students. The initiative focuses on leveling the playing field for students seeking higher education opportunities.

news.headline: New podcast reveals secrets to hiring auto technicians fast at Blue Check Shops in Oceanside, CA. Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: In OCEANSIDE, Calif., on December 10, 2024, Technician Find revealed the introduction of the Blue Check Shops Interview Series podcast. This podcast delves into the strategies employed by leading independent auto repair shops in swiftly acquiring and keeping skilled technicians. This series aims to uncover the methods these shops use to attract and retain top talent efficiently.

news.headline: PEEPSFEST® 2024 brings back iconic 400-pound Peeps® chick drop, introduces new Easter 2025 flavors and festival activities in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.
news.summary: Get a sneak peek at the upcoming Easter 2025 flavor lineup and the new festival activities planned for the 16th annual PEEPSFEST® in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania. The event is set to take place on December 31, 2024, as the world gears up to welcome the new year. Just Born will be hosting the festival, promising an exciting celebration.

news.headline: OPAC in Oxford, Alabama to showcase exclusive Broadway productions this season, unavailable elsewhere.
news.summary: In December 10, 2024, in Oxford, Alabama, the Oxford Performing Arts Center (OPAC) announced a thrilling roster of Broadway shows to be showcased. The lineup boasts a diverse selection of productions not found in nearby cities like Birmingham or Atlanta. The season promises to offer a unique entertainment experience to audiences in the heart of Oxford.

news.headline: Dongguk University in South Korea creates new gel-based nanogenerators for wearable tech, offering flexibility and durability. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A nanogenerator developed in Seoul, South Korea on Dec. 10, 2024 addresses issues of standard electrode materials by providing enhanced flexibility and extended durability, catered for wearable technology applications. The innovation envisions a scenario where clothing will have the ability to not only fuel electronic devices but also identify individuals through a straightforward process, marking a significant advancement in the field. This breakthrough offers promising opportunities for integration of advanced technology into everyday wear, presenting a glimpse into a future where wearables are powered efficiently on a long-term basis.

news.headline: ACI Learning launches myACI Marketplace with 18,000+ training courses, revolutionizing workforce development.
news.summary: In Colorado Springs on December 10, 2024, ACI Learning introduced the myACI Marketplace, an innovative inclusion to the myACI platform set to transform workforce development and training. The launch includes over 18,000 offerings, marking a significant advancement in accessible resources for professional growth.

news.headline: New Splash Apartments with 219 units in Portland's Kerns neighborhood opened on Oct. 25, 2024 by Security Properties.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon as of December 10, 2024, Security Properties has officially launched Splash Apartments, a new multi-family residential complex situated in the Kerns neighborhood. Featuring a total of 219 units, the property began housing its initial occupants on October 25, 2024, soon after an event organized by Time Out.

news.headline: Marker Therapeutics (Nasdaq: MRKR) CEO to present at Ladenburg Thalmann & Co. Virtual Oncology Symposium on Dec. 12.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Marker Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: MRKR), a company specializing in next-generation T cell-based immunotherapies for treating hematological malignancies and solid tumors, shared news that Juan Vera, M.D., the President and CEO, is scheduled to speak at the Ladenburg Thalmann & Co. Virtual Oncology Innovators & Investors Symposium on December 12, 2024. This event will provide an opportunity for stakeholders to learn more about the company's advancements in the field.

news.headline: Limited-edition RTD cold brew line launched by Reborn Coffee & Finlays at Art Basel Miami Beach 2024.
news.summary: Reborn Coffee, in collaboration with Finlays, introduces a new line of limited-edition RTD cold brew beverages during Art Basel Miami Beach in 2024. The collection features a variety of flavors and styles tailored for the event, including unique packaging designs. This collaboration showcases the expertise of both brands in the coffee industry and aims to offer consumers a premium yet convenient coffee experience. The launch of the RTD cold brew line at this prestigious event marks an exciting milestone for Reborn Coffee and Finlays as they present their innovative products to a wider audience.

news.headline: Banzai to acquire OpenReel, boosting TTM revenue by 152% to $10.9M. Enhances product portfolio with video solution.
news.summary: Banzai recently introduced OpenReel, an enterprise-grade branded video creation and management solution, to its expanding product lineup. This addition aims at addressing the increasing demand for high-quality video content in the market. OpenReel elevates Banzai's offerings, providing users with innovative tools for creating and managing professional videos. The integration of this new solution significantly enhances Banzai's product family, showcasing the company's commitment to meeting the needs of its growing user base.

news.headline: Mama’s Creations reschedules Q3 2025 fiscal results release to Dec 16, 2024 after market close. NASDAQ: MAMA.
news.summary: Mama’s Creations, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAMA), a prominent company specializing in fresh deli prepared foods, has decided to postpone its fiscal third quarter financial results announcement. The report, covering the period up to October 31, 2024, will now be disclosed after the market closes on Monday, December 16, 2024. This rescheduling provides investors and stakeholders with comprehensive insights into the company's performance during this critical period. Stay tuned for the updated financial information from Mama’s Creations, Inc.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips increases cash tender offers for debt securities and consent solicitations in an announcement.
news.summary: HOUSTON - ConocoPhillips has declared an increase in the scale of their cash tender offers for debt securities and provided early outcomes for consent solicitations.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips reports early participation results in exchange offers and consent solicitations from Houston.
news.summary: Houston-based ConocoPhillips recently disclosed the outcomes of its initial involvement in exchange offers and consent solicitations.

news.headline: LM Funding America, Inc. reports $14.2 million Bitcoin holdings value in November, 2024 update.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on December 10, 2024, LM Funding America, Inc. (NASDAQ: LMFA) shared a preliminary unaudited update regarding their Bitcoin mining operations. As a cryptocurrency mining and technology-focused finance company, LM Funding reported on their activities for the month ending on November 30, 2024.

news.headline: Ingersoll Rand to host 2024 sustainability investor call on Dec. 17 at 8:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Davidson, North Carolina, Ingersoll Rand Inc., a leading global company (NYSE: IR), specializing in essential flow generation and providing solutions for life science and industrial sectors, has announced it will conduct its annual sustainability investor call on December 17, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. EST. The purpose of the call is to review the company's dedication and recent achievements in sustainable leadership.

news.headline: Abacus Life secures $150M debt financing to support growth, arranged by Sagard with Värde Partners.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Abacus Life, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABL), a leading alternative asset manager, revealed the closure of a $150 million debt financing facility. The company focuses on utilizing longevity data and actuarial technology to provide unique investment opportunities. The flexible facility aims to support Abacus in achieving its strategic goals effectively. Sagard spearheaded the arrangement of the financing, while Värde Partners made a substantial commitment to the funding.

news.headline: Clene Inc. and its subsidiary received FDA guidance for accelerated approval of CNM-Au8® in ALS, a neurodegenerative disease.
news.summary: Clene Inc., a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CLNN, and its subsidiary Clene Nanomedicine Inc., are working to transform the treatment of neurodegenerative diseases like ALS and MS. Recently, they received advice from the Division of Neurology 1 at the FDA about a potential fast-track approval process for their product CNM-Au8® in treating ALS. This development was shared on December 10, 2024, in Salt Lake City. The company aims to provide innovative solutions for these conditions, with a focus on advancing therapies for ALS and MS.

news.headline: Lisata Therapeutics completes enrollment in Phase 1b/2a trial of certepetide combo for pancreatic, colon & appendiceal cancers.
news.summary: A Phase 1b/2a open-label trial is currently being conducted in the United States to evaluate certepetide in combination with neoadjuvant FOLFIRINOX-based therapies for the treatment of pancreatic, colon, and appendiceal cancers. The trial aims to assess the effectiveness and safety of this combination therapy in these types of cancers. This trial is significant as it could potentially offer new treatment options for patients with these cancers. The trial is expected to involve a significant number of participants and is a crucial step in advancing the knowledge and treatment of these cancers.

news.headline: Acuity Brands releases 2024 EarthLIGHT Report showcasing ESG accomplishments.(ATLANTA, Dec. 10, 2024) #NYSE #ESG
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Acuity Brands, Inc. (NYSE: AYI), a prominent industrial technology firm based in Atlanta, unveiled its EarthLIGHT Report for the fiscal year 2024. This report showcases various Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) achievements and provides insights into the progress made on key strategic objectives. Acuity continues to lead the market in this sector, with a strong focus on sustainability and corporate responsibility. The company's dedication to ESG principles is evident in the figures presented in the annual report.

news.headline: iPower's CFO to join Water Tower Research Fireside Chat on Dec 11, 2024, at 2:00 p.m. ET. (Nasdaq: IPW) #eCommerce #Tech
news.summary: A technology and data-driven ecommerce services provider and online retailer, iPower Inc. (Nasdaq: IPW) based in Rancho Cucamonga, California, shared news on December 10, 2024. The company's Chief Financial Officer, Kevin Vassily, is set to partake in the Water Tower Research Fireside Chat Series on December 11, 2024. This virtual event is scheduled for 2:00 p.m. ET.

news.headline: AgriFORCE aims to acquire a 5MW Bitcoin mining facility in Ohio, emphasizing sustainability and digital innovation.
news.summary: A agreement has been reached to purchase a 5MW Bitcoin mining facility in Madison Township, Ohio.

news.headline: Byrna Technologies reports record Q4 revenues of $28.0 million, total revenue for FY 2024 at $85.8 million (up over 100% from last year).
news.summary: In 2024, the total revenues for the full year amounted to $85.8 million, showcasing a remarkable increase of over 100% compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Logility responds to 2717 Partners' letter, focuses on business strategy and service excellence. $LGTY.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Logility Supply Chain Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: LGTY) has responded to a letter from 2717 Partners, LP on December 9, 2024. The company values shareholder input and is committed to its business strategy, aiming to deliver top-notch service in supply chain planning. Logility's Board of Directors and management continue to assess the business operations to ensure optimal performance.

news.headline: Cantaloupe, Inc. launches Smart Stores, a modern retail solution that goes beyond vending, revolutionizing f&b.
news.summary: Malvern, Pennsylvania - Cantaloupe introduces cutting-edge Smart Stores, a futuristic retail concept that surpasses conventional vending by redefining the retail and food and beverage industry. This innovative solution aims to revolutionize retail, providing a modern and advanced approach.

news.headline: IRADIMED is ranked 24th on Forbes' list of America's Most Successful Small-Cap Companies for 2025, known for MRI medical devices.
news.summary: In Winter Springs, Florida, on December 10, 2024, IRADIMED CORPORATION disclosed that it ranked 24th on Forbes' 2025 list of America’s top small-cap companies. Known as (NASDAQ: IRMD), the company specializes in pioneering MRI medical devices. They are notable for being the sole supplier of non-magnetic IV infusion pump systems and patient vital signs monitoring systems, specifically crafted for MRI operations.

news.headline: Tourmaline Bio emphasizes cardiovascular inflammation focus, shares clinical and strategic updates at Investor Day.
news.summary: Tourmaline Bio, a company specializing in cardiovascular inflammation, recently shared important updates at their Investor Day. They highlighted their focus on addressing inflammation in cardiovascular health. The event included key details on clinical progress and strategic developments. These updates are crucial for investors and stakeholders, as Tourmaline Bio continues to make significant strides in this area.

news.headline: Company Bloomreach recognized in Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for excellence in ecommerce.
news.summary: Bloomreach, a company based in Mountain View, California, has been recognized for its excellence in the ecommerce sector. The company has been honored by being included in Inc.'s prestigious 2024 Best in Business list. This accolade signifies Bloomreach's exceptional performance and success in the industry. The recognition highlights the company's dedication to providing top-notch ecommerce solutions.

news.headline: Jamf to present at investor conference on Dec. 10, 2024. Company known for managing Apple at work.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Minneapolis, a leading Apple management and security company, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF), disclosed that key executives will be participating in an upcoming investor conference. This news signifies the company's proactive engagement in investor relations and potential opportunities for stakeholders to gain insight into their operations.

news.headline: Bridgeline Digital introduces AI-powered Unified Search named HawkSearch, combining Keyword & Concept Search to enhance customer experiences.
news.summary: Bridgeline Digital, Inc. in WOBURN, Massachusetts announced on Dec. 10, 2024, their plans to enhance HawkSearch by merging keyword and concept search functionalities to create a new unified search tool called “Unified Search”. This integration of HawkSearch’s precise Keyword Search with the natural language processing abilities of Concept Search aims to provide quicker and more relevant results. This enhancement is intended to enhance customer experiences and boost engagement through more efficient search capabilities. Bridgeline Digital, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ as BLIN.

news.headline: GivBux, Inc. files audited financial statements with SEC, applies for OTCQB listing, enhancing credibility.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, GivBux, Inc. (OTC: GBUX), a publicly traded Super App and charitable giving platform based in Newport Beach, California, disclosed it has submitted its audited financial statements to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), marking its transition into a fully reporting company. Concurrently, the company revealed it has applied to OTC Markets for inclusion on the OTCQB platform. This move is considered pivotal in augmenting the company's presence and trustworthiness among investors.

news.headline: Conavi Medical to join MedInvest MedTech, AI & Digital Health Conference, showcasing latest innovations in healthcare sector.
SELLAS Life Sciences prompts interim review in Phase 3 REGAL Trial of GPS for Acute Myeloid Leukemia. #clinicaltrial #AML #oncology
news.summary: The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.1%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This improvement in the job market comes as 350,000 new jobs were added in various sectors across the nation. The report also indicates that the average hourly wage saw an increase of 2.5% compared to last year. These positive indicators are a promising sign for the economy, as businesses continue to recover from the impact of the pandemic.

news.headline: Workhorse partners with PMC as a certified dealer, increasing availability of electric vehicles for specialized fleets.
news.summary: PMC has recently partnered with Workhorse as a dealer, increasing the access to electric commercial vehicles for specialized fleets. This collaboration enables PMC to offer a wider range of electric vehicles to its customers, catering to the growing demand for sustainable transportation options in the market. This move aligns with PMC's commitment to environmentally friendly practices and supports the transition towards cleaner energy sources within the manufacturing industry. The incorporation of Workhorse vehicles into PMC's offerings is expected to have a significant impact, with a projected increase of over 30% in sales of electric commercial vehicles to specialized fleets by the end of the year. This development signifies a positive step towards promoting eco-friendly solutions and reducing carbon emissions in the transport sector.

news.headline: Ascenda's 2024 report highlights evolving business spending landscape with focus on rewards, flexibility.
news.summary: In the ever-changing business landscape, fintech innovations and shifting rewards programs are transforming how companies approach spending. Ascenda, a leading provider of loyalty services worldwide, published its 2024 State of Loyalty: Commercial Cards report in New York on December 10, 2024. This comprehensive report delves into the latest trends and potential advantages in commercial card loyalty programs, offering valuable insights for businesses looking to adapt to the evolving market.
